title: Postgres Rejecting Connections
page: app is throwing 'FATAL: pg_hba.conf rejects connection' on every request. started this morning. no deploys. the db host itself looks up.
hints: The error message names the file that's rejecting you - go read it
pg_hba.conf rules match top to bottom. After fixing it, reload: psql -U postgres -c 'SELECT pg_reload_conf()'
